label: Ashvault Sleep Niche
description: Ashvault Sleep Niche is a narrow, enclosed sleeping recess partitioned from the habartment’s main compartment by a sliding hygiene screen and gasketed trim. A single built-in bunk dominates the bay, its frame of void-black bracing bolted directly into the ferrocrete ribs and fitted with a restraint strap for alert-cycle drills. Recessed lumen strips sit behind a louvered diffuser, maintaining a cold, regulated light that reflects off scrubbed surfaces and standardized tally slates. A shallow stowage void beneath the bunk and a sealed vent head at the niche’s crown reinforce the cell’s quarantine-ready, filtration-dependent design.
